scripts.test:int: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -w db:reset:test && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -w db:migrate:test && pnpm --filter @apps/api test:run
scripts.db:reset:test: dotenv -e .env -- node -e "const { Client } = require('pg'); const client = new Client(process.env.TEST_DATABASE_URL); client.connect().then(() => client.query('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS pgmigrations, organizations, opportunities, activities, commissions CASCADE')).then(() => client.end());"
